ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shopping_centers" (
  "shopping_center_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shopping center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shopping center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shopping center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the shopping center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the shopping center */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the shopping center */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the shopping center */,
  "mall_type" TEXT /* Type of shopping center */,
  "total_sqft" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the shopping center */,
  "number_of_stores" INTEGER /* Number of stores in the shopping center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shopping_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_hash_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., camera, sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "shopping_center_id" TEXT /* Reference to the shopping center where the device is installed */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration or maintenance performed on the device */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration or maintenance performed on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_hash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_shopping_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("shopping_center_id") REFERENCES shopping_centers ("shopping_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "device_hash_id" TEXT /* Reference to the device that collected the visit data */,
  "visit_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "week_day" TEXT /* Day of the week of the visit */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the visit */,
  "time_rounded" TEXT /* Rounded time of the visit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the visitor_id in the visit_frequency table */,
  "entry_point" TEXT /* Entry point of the visitor */,
  "exit_point" TEXT /* Exit point of the visitor */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the visit */,
  "path_taken" TEXT /* Path taken by the visitor during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_device_hash_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_hash_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_hash_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit during which the behavior was observed */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior (e.g., dwell time, path taken) */,
  "behavior_value" REAL /* Value of the behavior (e.g., time spent in minutes, path coordinates) */,
  "behavior_category" TEXT /* Categorization of the behavior */,
  "behavior_subcategory" TEXT /* Sub-categorization of the behavior */,
  "behavior_value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the behavior value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_behavior_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit during which the demographic data was collected */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the visitor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the visitor */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the visitor */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the visitor */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the visitor */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the visitor */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_demographics_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of visits made by the visitor */,
  "visit_recency" TEXT /* Recency of the visit */,
  "visit_frequency_category" TEXT /* Categorization of the visit frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_frequency_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_devices" (
  "visitor_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor device */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visitor */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the visitor (e.g., phone, tablet) */,
  "device_imei" TEXT /* IMEI number of the visitor's device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the visitor's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_devices_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visit_frequency ("visitor_id")
)
